reign_notes: Founder of Qi, served Kings Wen and Wu of Zhou

fate: Boiled to death by Zhou court due to slander by Ji Hou (纪侯)

reign_events: Moved capital to Bogu (薄姑) during reign of King Yi of Zhou

relationship: Younger brother of Duke Ai (same mother)
reign_events: Killed Duke Hu, expelled Hu's sons, moved capital from Bogu to Linzi (临菑)
26th year: King Xuan of Zhou first enthroned; 24th year: King You killed by Quanrong, Zhou moved east to Luo

fate: Killed by supporters of Hu Gong's son due to tyranny

reign_events: Executed 70 people who killed his father
24th year: Quanrong killed King You, Zhou moved east; Qin first became feudal lords; 56th year: Jin killed Duke Zhao
9th year: Duke Yin of Lu first enthroned; 19th year: Duke Huan of Lu killed his brother Yin; 25th year: Northern Rong attacked Qi; 32nd year: Brother Yi Zhongnian died, his son Gongsun Wuzhi favored

Had conflict with Gongsun Wuzhi while crown prince; reduced Wuzhi's status after enthronement; had affair with sister who married Duke Huan of Lu; arranged killing of Duke Huan of Lu; killed by Gongsun Wuzhi's rebellion in 12th year
